sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value String, date DateTime, amount Float64);
SELECT uniq(value) AS unique_values_count, amount FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY amount HAVING uniq(value) > 2;
SELECT amount, uniq(value) FROM test_table WHERE (value != '' AND amount >= 100) OR (value == '20' AND amount IS NULL) GROUP BY amount HAVING uniq(value) < 4;
SELECT date, uniq(value), uniq(amount) FROM (SELECT value, amount, date FROM test_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date;
SELECT date, uniq(value) FROM (SELECT id, value, date FROM (SELECT id, value, date FROM test_table) WHERE id < 5) WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY date HAVING uniq(value) > 1;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, ref_id UInt32, value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table_2 VALUES (1, 1, 'A'), (2, 1, 'B'), (3, 2, NULL), (4, NULL, 'D');
SELECT uniq(t2.value) FROM test_table AS t1 JOIN test_table_2 AS t2 ON t1.id == t2.ref_id WHERE t1.amount IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.id;
SELECT amount, uniq(value) AS unique_count FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL OR (value IS NULL AND amount < 100) GROUP BY amount HAVING unique_count > 2;
